name: Cloopen
description: Cloopen — Chinese cloud communications API platform for SMS, voice calls, and video conferencing.

seo.title: Cloopen — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Cloopen: Cloopen — Chinese cloud communications API platform for SMS, voice calls, and video conferencing.

when_to_use: Chinese enterprise SMS OTP for mobile authentication
IVR voice call API for customer service automation
Video conferencing API for internal collaboration tools
A2P bulk SMS for Chinese e-commerce notifications
Cloud communications integration for domestic app stack

pros: Mature CPaaS inside China with local carrier reach
Covers SMS, voice, IVR and video in one stack
NYSE-listed vendor with enterprise track record
Competitive pricing for Chinese domestic volume
cons: Docs and console mostly Chinese, weak English support
International routes limited vs Twilio or Sinch
Past financial and governance controversies raised flags
Compliance footprint complicated for non-China buyers
review.verdict: Solid domestic CPaaS for China, but outside the mainland the language and compliance friction outweigh the savings.
review.best_for: Companies operating inside mainland China needing SMS, voice, video APIs
review.not_for: Western teams wanting English docs, clean compliance, and global routing
